notes: Official BirdDog tech specs page confirms: 3.5mm Audio In (Mono) and 3.5mm Audio Out (Mono) — both are mono, not stereo. Serial control ports are listed as '2x RJ45: RS232 / RS422 / RS485 Connectors', meaning each RJ45 port supports RS232, RS422, and RS485. NDI port also provides PoE+ (IEEE 802.3at) power input. Genlock supports BBS (Black Burst Sync) and Tri-level sync via BNC. HDMI version (1.4), Ethernet speed grade (1G), USB version (2.0), and power connector sub-type (JEITA type 4) are not confirmed on the official tech specs page and are sourced from secondary/retailer listings — confidence reduced to medium accordingly. The device is a PTZ camera, not rack-mountable.

ports.name: NDI / PoE+
ports.note: Single RJ45 for NDI video output, VISCA over IP control, and PoE+ (IEEE 802.3at) power input; 1G grade from secondary sources, not confirmed on official spec page

ports.name: RS232 / RS422 / RS485 Control
ports.note: Two RJ45 ports for RS232, RS422, and RS485 PTZ control (VISCA and PELCO D protocols); adapter cables supplied

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: HDMI Type A output with embedded audio; version 1.4 reported by secondary sources but not confirmed on official spec page

ports.name: 6G-SDI Out
ports.note: Supports 6G-SDI and 3G-SDI modes; YCbCr 4:2:2 10-bit; embedded audio

ports.name: Genlock In
ports.note: Accepts Black Burst Sync (BBS) and Tri-level sync for multi-camera synchronization

ports.name: Audio In
ports.note: Mono analog line-level / mic-level input (official spec: 3.5mm Audio In Mono)

ports.name: Audio Out
ports.note: Mono analog line-level output (official spec: 3.5mm Audio Out Mono)

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB Type-A; used for firmware upgrades only; USB 2.0 reported by secondary sources but not confirmed on official spec page

ports.name: DC 12V
ports.note: 12V DC power input; JEITA type 4 sub-type reported by secondary sources but not confirmed on official spec page
